# Covid.view.country.Gallery: entering the gallery without a selected country and then selecting one throws an error

![Screenshot 2020-07-13 at 23 47 38](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1177434/87357375-29fbf100-c564-11ea-94b5-df8c70fdaf0e.png)

will try to get a fix ready for the v1.3 release.

in general, the gallery will try to select an item inside the "middle" in case there is no selection.

not 100% sure yet, how the desired behaviour should be.
